description_long: This is a light blue athletic shoe, likely a soccer cleat, featuring a streamlined synthetic upper with subtle texturing for grip and control. The shoe has a low-cut design with a padded collar and a reinforced heel for stability. The lacing system is a standard criss-cross style, providing a secure fit across the top of the foot. The outsole is equipped with multiple conical studs, optimized for traction on grass or turf surfaces. There are gold accents, including a logo on the tongue and heel, adding a touch of visual contrast. The interior appears to be lined with a soft, dark material for comfort and support during athletic activity.
description: A light blue, low-cut athletic soccer cleat with gold logo accents, textured synthetic upper, and conical studded outsole for traction.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded toe, lacing system, and gold logo on the tongue.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the streamlined profile, textured upper, and gold logo on the heel.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the reinforced heel and gold logo at the back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals the low-cut collar and studded outsole.
attribute_logo: Gold Adidas logo on the tongue and gold 'M' logo on the heel
